title: UnboundGrass
description: Unbound Grass 🌿 – A vibrant green-themed grass overlay
body:
# 🌿 Unbound Grass Overlay – Ultra-Realistic Grass for Minecraft

## 📜 About

**Unbound Grass Overlay is a high-quality resource pack designed to enhance Minecraft’s terrain with ultra-detailed grass textures. It seamlessly blends with the environment, creating a more immersive and natural landscape without affecting performance.**

### ✨ Features

**High-Quality Grass Textures – Crisp, realistic, and detailed.**

**Seamless Blending – Smooth transitions between blocks.**

**Works as an Overlay – Compatible with any resource pack.**

**Optimized for FPS – Ensures smooth performance.**

**Supports Vanilla, OptiFine & Iris – Works with shader packs for enhanced visuals.**
